pattern: Track the current nesting depth and add a power of two whenever a pair closes immediately, since an innermost pair at depth d contributes two to the d-th power to the total.
hints: Only the innermost pairs actually generate a base score; every enclosing pair just doubles whatever is inside.
An innermost pair sitting at nesting depth d is worth 2 raised to the d, because each surrounding layer doubles it.
Scan left to right tracking depth: increment on an open bracket, decrement on a close, and whenever you close right after an open, add 2^depth to the running total.

edge_inputs.description: deep nesting yields a power of two
nested pair beside a flat pair
mixed siblings inside an outer wrap
a run of flat pairs sums linearly

stress.description: random balanced strings built by a recursive grammar so every generated string is guaranteed balanced
stress.note: the grammar (wrap or concatenate) only ever emits balanced strings within the length cap
